**Project:** TrendBuy Return Reduction Initiative
**Sprint:** Sprint 4. Xgboost Modeling And Validation
**Objective:** Train a robust XGBoost model that flags high-regret-risk purchases with target performance and operational characteristics.

## Description
Formulate the problem as a binary classification task, optimizing for precision at a business-selected operating point.
